creator: trasz@pin.if.uz.zgora.pl
text:
Try to work around the configure problem, hardcoding the proper option instead
of letting ./configure to figure it out.

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.5.2006100420/basiliskII-1.0_3.log.bz2

(Honestly, i have no idea why that fails.  I was unable to reproduce it.)

Also, update master site.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-src-Unix-configure

Port maintainer (mmendez@energyhq.be) is cc'd.
